sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at 37-39, 36-39
# Try LEFT to move toward left box
# Bottom-center box at 36-39, 32-35 might block

result = action(['LEFT'])
print(f"LEFT result: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Green at rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
